appraisal_events.evidence: « Pauvre petit… je trouve qu’il a eu raison. … j’aurais voulu le rattraper… non pas pour le retenir certes, mais pour lui dire que je ne lui en veux pas. »
appraisal_events.explanation: Robert’s mother reverses course, expresses tenderness and absolves him, explicitly saying he was right. This locally validates Robert’s conduct.

status_effects.explanation: He gains local validation as his mother shifts blame onto herself and affirms that he was justified.
